text: A street scene in a city, likely Mumbai, India. A large, leafy tree with exposed roots stands on the left corner of a wet, paved street. A yellow and blue taxi is parked on the right side of the street, near a pinkish-orange building. A billboard is visible above the tree, and a person is walking further down the street.
